news.title: Restaurant ’t Fornuis gaat na 50 jaar dicht, chef Johan Segers start aan overkant kleinere zaak met zelfde naam - GVA
news.summary:
# Summary

After 50 years in operation, the well-established Belgian restaurant 't Fornuis is closing its current location, but chef Johan Segers is opening a smaller version of the restaurant across the street under the same name. Visitors to the city who appreciated the original restaurant's long-standing reputation can expect to find familiar cuisine and the same chef at the new, more compact venue.
